name: TinyUSB Standard Gamepad (No Report ID)
notes: 66-byte descriptor (no Report ID). Source: TinyUSB hid_device.h TUD_HID_REPORT_DESC_GAMEPAD macro expansion. 6x signed 8-bit axes, 8-way hat, 32 buttons. The most widely used embedded USB gamepad descriptor — used by RP2040, ESP32, STM32 projects.
